states.input_observed: emit an ID-array tuple and its exact or derived value
states.input_known_zero: emit zero only for a legal known-state tuple
states.input_unknown: omit the tuple; never substitute zero
states.target_observed: parallel target_mask is 1 and value is finite, including a true zero
states.target_unobserved: parallel target_mask is 0 and tuple value is null

availability.clinical_hour: selects the time block represented by the event
availability.available_hour: for input, must be <= prediction_hour; prevents delayed lab or report leakage
availability.target: target truth uses clinical time inside the future block and is not exposed to the input

field_exceptions.respiratory_support: absence of all support evidence is unknown, not off; category zero is valid only when another registered support category establishes block or edge coverage
field_exceptions.urine_output: zero records makes SUM unknown/masked while COUNT remains a known zero
field_exceptions.antibiotics: inputevents ADMINISTRATION and prescriptions ORDER_START/ORDER_ACTIVE are separate legal sources and are never pooled
